name: io.github.codeurali/dataverse
title: MCP Dataverse
description: 50 tools for Microsoft Dataverse: query, CRUD, metadata, search, files, audit, batch, and more.

environmentVariables.name: MCP_CONFIG_PATH
environmentVariables.description: Path to a config.json file (overrides all other env vars). Recommended for VS Code / Claude Desktop setups.

environmentVariables.name: AUTH_MODE
environmentVariables.description: Authentication mode: 'pac' (Power Platform CLI, default) or 'msal' (client credentials)

environmentVariables.name: PAC_PROFILE_NAME
environmentVariables.description: Power Platform CLI profile name (only when AUTH_MODE=pac)

environmentVariables.name: TENANT_ID
environmentVariables.description: Azure AD tenant ID (only when AUTH_MODE=msal)

environmentVariables.name: CLIENT_ID
environmentVariables.description: Azure AD application (client) ID (only when AUTH_MODE=msal)

environmentVariables.name: CLIENT_SECRET
environmentVariables.description: Azure AD client secret (only when AUTH_MODE=msal)
